sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54515" key="katamesto/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταμεστ-όω</orth>, <sense id="n54515.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fill quite full of</tr_> a thing, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινος</itype> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:145:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">145.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
